meta.title: Bünyamin Aydeniz — Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Bünyamin Aydeniz — a Computer Programming graduate building full-stack apps with Laravel, TypeScript, and AI/RAG. Currently looking for junior developer roles.

hero.subtitle: A Computer Programming graduate building full-stack apps focused on Laravel, TypeScript, and AI/RAG. Looking for junior roles.

about.title: Full-stack developer
about.body: I'm a Computer Programming graduate from İstanbul Arel University. I build full-stack projects with Laravel, React/TypeScript, Node.js, and Python/FastAPI. I'm especially interested in AI and RAG integrations, and I care about writing tests and keeping architecture clean and maintainable.

fluxion.description: AI workflow automation platform with agent nodes (mini n8n/Zapier). Visual editor, DAG engine, queue/worker architecture, real-time collaboration and multi-user RBAC.

taskflow.description: A real-time Kanban app with live sync via Socket.IO, role-based access control, notifications, and analytics.

larajob.description: A job board built with Laravel. Features semantic search, job-candidate match scoring, and AI-assisted capabilities.

ragbot.description: A RAG system that answers questions over uploaded documents, with clickable source citations and conversation memory.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.invite: Reach out to work together or just ask a question.
